models.name: Spatial-SSRL
models.description: [CVPR 2026] Official release of "Spatial-SSRL: Enhancing Spatial Understanding via Self-Supervised Reinforcement Learning"

models.name: Forgetting-A-New-Mechanism-Towards-Better-Large-Language-Model-Fine-tuning
models.description: Code for "FORGETTING: A New Mechanism Towards Better Large Language Model Fine-Tuning" paper. Novel approach for LLM fine-tuning using token-level forgetting mechanism.

models.name: mcp-github-pr-issue-analyser
models.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) application for automated GitHub PR analysis and issue management. Enables LLMs to fetch PR details, analyse diffs, manage issues, and handle releases through a standardised interface

models.name: AI-ML-ENGINEERING-JOURNEY
models.description: A structured end-to-end AI/ML engineering journey covering mathematics, machine learning, deep learning, large language models, MLOps, and production-grade projects. Built with a strong focus on fundamentals, implementation, and real-world systems.

models.name: AI-Voice-Agent
models.description: 🗣️ Build an interactive voice agent that leverages Speech-to-Text, a Large Language Model, and Text-to-Speech for real-time voice interactions.

models.name: diffweave-ai
models.description: Generate meaningful Git commit messages using large language models (LLMs)

models.name: synapz
models.description: synapz is a research prototype exploring how large language models can adapt teaching content to different cognitive styles. built over a 48-hour sprint with a strict $50 api budget, this project implements a scientific framework to test whether adaptive teaching produces measurably better results than static approaches.

models.name: Auto-Pentest-LLM
models.description: 🔍 Automate penetration testing with an intelligent agent that organizes security assessments, leveraging local LLMs and Kali Linux for effective exploitation.

models.name: landfall
models.description: Focused release pipeline: conventional commits → technical changelogs → LLM-synthesized user-facing release notes

models.name: Source-Code-Security-Audit-Reviewer
models.description: intelligent auditing tool powered by large language models, supporting GPT, . It automatically detects security vulnerabilities, performance issues

models.name: press-release-tracking-llm-agent
models.description: Agent that tracks companies

models.name: ai-agent-pulse
models.description: Daily automated tracking of 19 AI agent frameworks. Pulse Score ranks momentum via star velocity, release freshness, commit activity, and community health.

models.name: modelarr
models.description: Radarr/Sonarr for LLM models. Monitors HuggingFace for new releases matching a watchlist and auto-downloads them to a local library.

models.name: ReleaseNotesRec-Agent
models.description: An AI-powered Release Notes & Feedback Analysis Agent built using LangChain, ChromaDB, and LLMs. It collects release notes, Reddit feedback, and real-world user issues, performs sentiment/topic analysis, and delivers accurate insights through a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) workflow.

models.name: PentestGPT-v2
models.description: This repository is a working-fork of the anonymized code artifact released with the arXiv paper "What Makes a Good LLM Agent for Real-world Penetration Testing?" https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.17622

models.name: llm-abm-wom-diffusion
models.description: A dual-architecture (Go+Python) Agent-Based Modeling framework for simulating new product diffusion in complex networks using Large Language Models (LLMs).

models.name: Newmind-master
models.description: Developing a large language model entirely of one's own creation

models.name: Network-Traffic-Triage-System
models.description: An automated alert triage pipeline for Security Operations Centers (SOCs) that uses large language models to classify network intrusion alerts, reduce false positives, and generate structured incident reports.

models.name: trader-data
models.description: A toolkit for applying generative AI, large language models (LLMs), and machine learning to trading and financial data analysis. Includes Python and Go utilities for data collection, strategy experimentation, and intelligent automation in trading workflows.

models.name: Apsara-Agentic-API
models.description: Apsara Agentic is a production-ready backend system for building an AI-powered agentic  coding platform. It explores how modern AI agents can understand tasks, reason through problems, and generate code using large language models.

models.name: Resume-parser
models.description: AI Resume Parser is an intelligent document processing system that extracts structured information from unstructured resumes using Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Large Language Models (LLMs).

models.name: memfuse
models.description: MemFuse offers a robust memory layer for large language models, enhancing their performance and efficiency. Join our community on GitHub to explore features, report issues, or request new functionalities! 🐙💻

models.name: LLM-Applications
models.description: Repository for advanced Large Language Model (LLM) applications and research, focusing on fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and deployment strategies.

models.name: CAPruner
models.description: The official implementation for ACL 2026 paper CAPruner: Conceptual-Adjacent Scene Graph Pruner for Enhancing 3D Spatial Reasoning of Large Language Models

models.name: Smart_Shop-AI-Assistant
models.description: SmartShop Al is an intelligent shopping assistant built on a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture. It enables customers to ask natural-language questions about a product catalog loaded directly from a CSV file and receive accurate, grounded answers powered by a large language model .

models.name: AI_Ecommerse-matcher
models.description: AI system for semantic product deduplication across multilingual e-commerce listings LLM-powered product matching and deduplication for noisy multilingual catalogs Smart product deduplication using LLMs for price comparison platforms Semantic clustering of duplicate products using large language models AI-powered entity resolution for product match

models.name: OPSD
models.description: Train large language models with on-policy self-distillation for token-level reasoning and better performance

models.name: aegisRT
models.description: Provide a Python-native framework to test and audit security in large language models with coverage of key OWASP LLM risks.

models.name: zettelvault
models.description: Organize Obsidian vaults into clean PARA and Zettelkasten structures using large language models for efficient knowledge management.

models.name: vgt-auto-punisher
models.description: Detect and block network threats in Linux kernels using hybrid L4 and L7 behavioral analysis for effective intrusion prevention and response.

models.name: OnePersonCompany
models.description: Transform daily progress into structured reports, release notes, and shareable content to simplify solo or small team project management.

models.name: HowHungryisAIRepo
models.description: This repository powers the “How Hungry is AI?” dashboard and provides the code + data release accompanying our paper on inference-phase (operational) environmental footprints of LLMs.

models.name: TMT_Quantum_Vault-
models.description: TMT Quantum Vault is a research repository for a multi-agent quantum intelligence system whose agent DNA is derived from real IBM quantum hardware job results. The repository combines hardware-validated circuit artifacts, DNA-inspired data models, resonance metrics, and a typed Python CLI for inspection, validation, and release workflows.

models.name: langchain-movie-recommendation
models.description: 🎬 LLM-based Movie Recommendation System built using LangChain and Streamlit. The app suggests highly rated movies based on user preferences like genre, language, and release period using OpenRouter-powered large language models.

models.name: daily-tech
models.description: Daily tech intelligence report — fetches GitHub trends & releases, summarizes with LLM, generates a styled HTML dashboard

models.name: ash
models.description: Ash is a new SOTA LLM Architecture that feature Contextual Epistemic Release, attention heads that teach LLMs how to forget.

models.name: MarketMonitor
models.description: 🧠 Premium AI market intelligence — weekly digest of high-signal papers, GitHub momentum, and HuggingFace releases. Scored by LLM, delivered via Telegram + email.

models.name: community-release-llm-integration
models.description: AI tasks that interact with LLMs and MCP servers

models.name: Nova-ai-bot-new-
models.description: Nova is highly professional ai language model

models.name: AI-News-Newsletter-Assistant
models.description: Aggregate and summarize AI news from RSS feeds using multithreading and large language models, delivering formatted newsletters to your email automatically.

models.name: Recipe-Language-Model
models.description: Recipe Language Model (RLM): We introduce a domain-specific RLM developed through seven AI layers and interconnected robotic boxes to drive the evolution of physical AI for defining a new paradigm - Materials Intelligence.

models.name: Fake-news-detector
models.description: A fully local, transparent, and explainable fake news detection system built from scratch without relying on pretrained language models. This project emphasizes interpretability, customizability, and privacy by processing everything locally with complete transparency into the decision-making process.

models.name: Fake-News-Identification-using-NLP-Techniques
models.description: This is a simple Fake News Detection system built using Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Machine Learning. The model can classify a news statement as real or fake based on patterns learned from the training data.

models.name: new-language-model
models.description: The New Language Model uses context engineering to facilitate Bible translation.

models.name: Fake-News-Prediction-using-NLP
models.description: The project explores both a custom LSTM-based language model and a pre-trained GPT-2 model for text generation and perplexity evaluation.

models.name: Language-Modeling-for-Urdu-News-Articles
models.description: This repository focuses on building a complete end-to-end Natural Language Processing  pipeline for the Urdu language using real-world BBC Urdu news data.

models.name: Fake_News_detector
models.description: An advanced fake news detection system powered by transformer-based language models

models.name: govuk-document-clustering-experiment
models.description: Feasibility of suggesting new topics on GOV.UK using a sentence transformer model, document clustering & a large language model

models.name: Fake-News-Detection
models.description: Developed a text classification system to identify fake and real news using Natural Language Processing (NLP)Preprocessed textual data by removing stopwords, punctuation, and performing text normalization Implemented TF-IDF vectorization for feature extraction from news articles Trained &evaluated a Logistic Regression model achieving ~98% accuracy

models.name: FakeNewsDetector
models.description: A robust Natural Language Processing project for fake news detection, utilizing Scikit-Learn, TensorFlow, and advanced sequential modeling (LSTMs)

models.name: email-news
models.description: This project is an automated AI-driven news intelligence pipeline. It fetches live news data, utilizes Large Language Models (LLMs) to synthesize the information, and delivers a summary directly to your inbox.

models.name: news-headline-gen
models.description: Large Language Models Course Project | News Headline Generation

models.name: news-summarizer-ai
models.description: An automated news intelligence tool that aggregates real-time data and utilizes Large Language Models (LLMs) to provide concise, 3-bullet point technical summaries on user-defined topics.

models.name: FakeNewsMuRIL
models.description: Multilingual Fake News Detection using MuRIL Transformer Model for Indian Languages
